name: team_task_transition
description: Transition a task to a new lifecycle state. Tasks follow a structured workflow: defining -> compiling -> compiled -> in_progress -> completed/failed. Use this to advance a task through its lifecycle, mark it complete with results, or record a failure with diagnostics. Invalid transitions will be rejected.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to transition

target_state.description: The target lifecycle state to transition the task to

failure_type.description: Category of failure when transitioning to 'failed' state (e.g., 'timeout', 'dependency_error', 'execution_error', 'validation_error')

failure_reason.description: Detailed explanation of why the task failed, used when transitioning to 'failed' state

results.description: Results or outputs produced by the task, used when transitioning to 'completed' state

completion_notes.description: Summary notes about what was accomplished, used when transitioning to 'completed' state

identifier.description: Identifier for the artifact (e.g., PR number, file path)

url.description: URL to access the artifact if applicable

artifacts.description: List of artifacts produced during task execution, used when completing

actual_duration.description: Actual time spent on the task (e.g., '45 minutes', '2.5 hours')

examples.name: Transition task to completed with results

parameters.completion_notes: Implemented OAuth flow with full test coverage. All integration tests pass.

examples.name: Transition task to failed with diagnostics

parameters.failure_reason: Required API endpoint from task_v2_ghi789 is not yet deployed. Cannot proceed with integration testing.
